allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking gives dialectical-reasoning the evaluative discipline needed to turn contradiction into better judgment rather than theater.
allies.source_quote: Dialectical reasoning demands metacognition ... aligning with the systematic evaluation required by critical thinking.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps dialectical-reasoning hold interrelationships and context long enough to synthesize opposing perspectives into a more structural view.
allies.source_quote: The model naturally integrates with systems thinking

allies.rationale_text: Step-back helps dialectical-reasoning slow the rush to closure so thesis and antithesis can both be inspected before synthesis.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines dialectical-reasoning by protecting the favored thesis instead of letting the counterposition genuinely reshape the answer.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Dialectical-reasoning conflicts with simplification when the synthesis stage adds complexity that obscures the cleaner insight available from choosing between thesis and antithesis.
structured_tensions.source_quote: dialectical-reasoning conflicts with simplification (simplification) when the synthesis stage adds complexity that obscures the cleaner insight available from choosing between thesis and antithesis.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Dialectical-reasoning conflicts with commitment-bias when the synthesis requirement forces premature reconciliation of positions that are genuinely incompatible, diluting the stronger argument.
structured_tensions.source_quote: dialectical-reasoning conflicts with commitment-bias (commitment bias) when the synthesis requirement forces premature reconciliation of positions that are genuinely incompatible, diluting the stronger argument.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on critical, systems, and slow-thinking allies plus one clean antagonist around one-sided belief protection, so the file keeps that conservative surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation widening beyond the clearly named synthesis and anti-one-sided-certainty neighborhood.
open_questions: Feynman-technique is source-real ally pressure, but the retained set favors already-curated models that more directly support debate-to-synthesis discipline.
